why.title: Why an Innovation Lab
why.p1: In a world where technology transforms every aspect of our lives, universities need spaces where students can go beyond theory. The Innovation Lab is that space: a place where ideas become functional prototypes and learning happens through practice.
why.p2: Our lab operates with an iterative prototyping and validation methodology, complementing engineering programs with hands-on experience in emerging technologies. Here, students don't just learn to code — they learn to innovate, to work as a team, and to solve real problems.
why.p3: Guatemala has enormous technological potential. Through workshops, introductory talks, and applied projects, we aim to boost the innovation and tech entrepreneurship ecosystem in the country, connecting the university with industry and the community.
